whoami.description: Meta-orquestador autonómo multi-capa — cerebro que gerencia agentes via loops inteligentes — detecta, planifica, mejora, despliega, monitorea, corrige y entrega

plan.description: Plan-only mode — generates plans but does NOT execute

build.description: Fast build mode — executes BUILD pipeline directly (T2-T3). Clasifica scope T2/T3, despliega agentes necesarios (architect, tdd-guide, code-reviewer, build-error-resolver, ramon), verifica gates (build+lint+tests), y entrega resultado. Si scope es T4, sugiere /plan primero. No planifiques — clasifica y ejecuta.

architect.description: Senior software architect specializing in scalable, maintainable system design

tdd-guide.description: Test-Driven Development specialist enforcing write-tests-first methodology with 80%+ coverage

code-reviewer.description: Senior code reviewer ensuring high standards of code quality, security, and maintainability

build-error-resolver.description: Expert build error resolution specialist fixing TypeScript, compilation, and build errors with minimal changes

security-reviewer.description: Expert security specialist focused on identifying and remediating OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities

refactor-cleaner.description: Dead code cleanup, duplicate elimination, and consolidation specialist

planner.description: Senior technical planner for decomposing complex features into actionable plans

ramon.description: Agente especializado en limpieza de codigo, deteccion de errores y correccion progresiva orientada a preservar funcionalidad

vega.description: Agente especializado en verificar, diagnosticar y corregir conexion Supabase en cualquier proyecto

e2e-runner.description: E2E browser testing with Playwright — verifica flujos criticos de usuario post-BUILD

doc-updater.description: Documentacion automatica — genera/actualiza README, CHANGELOG, API docs post-delivery

reverse-explorer.description: Explora archivos, carpetas, estructura y metadatos sin asumir reglas — inventario y clasificacion

reverse-hypothesis.description: Infere reglas, transformaciones y logica implicita desde evidencia observada

reverse-validator.description: Valida hipotesis, busca contraejemplos y estima cobertura de reglas con muestreo estrategico

reverse-spec-writer.description: Redacta el plano final del proceso observado y la propuesta de automatizacion

whoami-planner.description: GOAP-like multi-path planner. Genera >=3 enfoques con precondiciones, riesgos, costos, y recomienda la ruta mas exacta. Ruflo-inspired.

whoami-loop.description: Ciclo de refinamiento iterativo. Recibe feedback, ajusta, re-ejecuta, repite hasta PASS o agota iteraciones (max 3). Ruflo autopilot-inspired.

assistant.description: OpenFang default assistant — conversational AI for general queries and tasks

coder.description: OpenFang code generation and software development agent

clip.description: OpenFang Clip Hand — YouTube downloader, moment detection, vertical shorts creation with captions and thumbnails

lead.description: OpenFang Lead Hand — daily prospect discovery, ICP enrichment, scoring 0-100, dedup and delivery

collector.description: OpenFang Collector Hand — OSINT intelligence, continuous monitoring, change detection, knowledge graph

predictor.description: OpenFang Predictor Hand — superforecasting with calibrated reasoning, confidence intervals, Brier score tracking

researcher.description: OpenFang Researcher Hand — deep multi-source research, CRAAP credibility, cited reports, multi-language

twitter.description: OpenFang Twitter Hand — autonomous X/Twitter account manager, content creation, scheduling, engagement

browser.description: OpenFang Browser Hand — web automation, form filling, multi-step workflows, Playwright bridge

crawl4ai-scraper.description: Crawl4AI single-page scraper — extrae contenido web a markdown/HTML/JSON limpio LLM-friendly

crawl4ai-deep-crawler.description: Crawl4AI deep crawler — multi-page BFS/DFS crawling con max-pages y same-domain

crawl4ai-extractor.description: Crawl4AI extractor — extraccion estructurada LLM-driven con queries y schemas CSS/XPath

autocode.description: Autoloop code generation agent — genera codigo siguiendo especificaciones y buenas practicas

autoqa.description: Autoloop QA agent — verifica calidad, detecta regresiones y asegura estandares

autotest.description: Autoloop test agent — genera y ejecuta tests automatizados

autofix.description: Autoloop fix agent — corrige errores y problemas de forma autonoma

autoreview.description: Autoloop review agent — revisa codigo y provee feedback estructurado

autosec.description: Autoloop security agent — identifica vulnerabilidades y aplica parches de seguridad

autospec.description: Autoloop spec agent — genera y mantiene especificaciones tecnicas

page-agent.description: Page Agent — crea paginas web completas con Three.js, animaciones premium y diseno moderno

sandbox-agent.description: Sandbox agent — entorno aislado para ejecucion segura de codigo y pruebas

session-agent.description: Session agent — gestion de sesiones de aprendizaje y contexto persistente

agent-reach.description: Agent Reach — 14-platform web access (Twitter, Reddit, GitHub, YouTube, RSS, etc.)

agent-reach-web.description: Agent Reach web scraper — extrae contenido de cualquier URL via Jina Reader/crawl4ai/OpenFang

agent-reach-twitter.description: Agent Reach Twitter/X agent — busca, lee hilos y extrae conversaciones

agent-reach-youtube.description: Agent Reach YouTube agent — obtiene transcripciones y metadatos de videos

agent-reach-github.description: Agent Reach GitHub agent — consulta repos, README, issues y actividad

agent-reach-reddit.description: Agent Reach Reddit agent — lee posts, hilos y comentarios de subreddits

agent-reach-rss.description: Agent Reach RSS agent — parsea feeds RSS/Atom y devuelve entradas

frontend-developer.description: Frontend developer especializado en React, Tailwind, FluxUI y experiencias de usuario premium

backend-architect.description: Backend architect especializado en arquitecturas escalables, APIs y bases de datos

product-manager.description: Product manager — define requisitos, historias de usuario y priorizacion

ui-designer.description: UI/UX designer — crea interfaces atractivas, accesibles y coherentes

ai-engineer.description: AI/ML engineer — implementa modelos, pipelines y soluciones de IA

devops-automator.description: DevOps automator — CI/CD, infraestructura como codigo, despliegue automatizado

security-auditor.description: Security auditor — auditoria de seguridad, OWASP, cumplimiento y hardening

performance-tester.description: Performance tester — benchmarks, load testing, profiling y optimizacion

data-analyst.description: Data analyst — analisis de datos, visualizaciones, informes y metricas

content-strategist.description: Content strategist — estrategia de contenido, SEO, copywriting y brand voice

browser-daemon.description: Headless browser agent — fast page navigation, screenshots, interaction testing via gstack browse daemon

seo-specialist.description: SEO & GEO specialist — audits, keyword research, SERP analysis, schema markup

image-designer.description: AI image/logo/banner generation specialist using Gemini 3 Pro

producthunt-agent.description: Product Hunt API agent — posts, launches, topics, makers, trends

domain-hunter.description: Domain name search — brainstorming, WHOIS availability, registrar price comparison

spec-writer-v2.description: Five-phase specification writer — why, scope, tech study, draft, final file

harness-creator.description: Harness Engineering specialist — scaffolds and validates five-subsystem harness (Instructions, State, Verification, Scope, Lifecycle)

stack-detector.description: Technology stack detector — identifies languages, frameworks, package managers in any project (92 stacks, 30+ languages)

harness-configurator.description: Project harness configurator — generates AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, init.sh, progress.md, session-handoff.md

team-factory.description: Multi-agent team factory — generates specialized agent teams from domain descriptions, 6 architectural patterns, 3 execution modes

eval-harness.description: Eval-Driven Development specialist — defines capability/regression evals, runs pass@k metrics, promotes discovered skills to global WHOAMI memory

plan.description: Plan-only mode — planner genera >=3 enfoques pero NO ejecuta

build.description: Fast build mode — WHOAMI ejecuta BUILD pipeline directamente (T2-T3)

review.description: Audita el diff actual por sobre-ingenieria aplicando la Escalera de Optimalidad

audit-open.description: Audita el repositorio COMPLETO por sobre-ingenieria y codigo inflado

whoami.description: WHOAMI meta-orchestrator — despliega el pipeline multi-agente completo

openfang.description: OpenFang control — manage Hands, channels, and security
openfang.template:
Eres el controlador OpenFang. Analiza el comando y ejecuta la accion correspondiente.

$ARGUMENTS

clip.description: Download YouTube video and create vertical shorts with captions

crawl.description: Crawl a URL with Crawl4AI — single page, deep BFS/DFS, or LLM extraction

autoloop.description: Autoloop — pipeline autonomo de codigo, tests, QA, fix, review, security y spec

page-agent.description: Page Agent — crea paginas web completas con efectos visuales premium

design.description: Design mode — disena y prototipa interfaces con el page-agent

zero.description: Zero — sandbox y session agents para ejecucion aislada y contexto persistente

reach.description: Agent Reach — accede a 14+ plataformas web: /reach:web, /reach:twitter, /reach:youtube, /reach:github, /reach:reddit, /reach:rss, /reach:doctor

agency.description: Agency — despliega equipo multi-agente (frontend, backend, PM, UI, AI, DevOps, security, performance, data, content)

harness.description: Harness Engineering — scaffold and validate five-subsystem harness for any project

eval.description: Eval-Driven Development — define capability/regression evals and run pass@k metrics

team.description: Team Factory — generate multi-agent teams from domain descriptions
